creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
Update port biology/emboss from 1.4.0 to 1.5.0.  This is semi-urgent as the
distfile for 1.4.0 has been removed from the master site, and is not yet on
FreeBSD distfiles mirrors due to 1.4.0 having had such a short lifetime.  To
prevent this happening in future, I added a mirror which keeps older versions
to MASTER_SITES.
